remarks: OPUS at Harbor Point is the newest luxury waterfront residential building. Opus is a refined, boutique-style residential building situated beside the picturesque Long Island Sound. Each space is artfully comprised of materials, textures, and tones that tastefully whisper opulence. The first-class service is at the heart of each of the amenities offered at Opus. From in-house spa rooms, highly trained concierge, state of the art gym to our putting green, Opus is perfectly paired with amenities that will enable you to float through your day-to-day life like a beautiful melody.
